title: rohrbachia martini
side_effects: Rohrbachia martini can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to respiratory failure, cardiac arrest, and even death. Additionally, improper use of the plant may cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and swelling, as well as gastrointestinal issues like diarrhea and abdominal pain. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using Rohrbachia martini for any health-related purposes.
